creator: arkadiusz.majewski@iptrace.pl
text:
Please add dependency for phpmailer with php7.
It works fine with the new php version but sadly the following problem occurs during packages upgrading.

Installed packages to be REMOVED:
        php70-7.0.12

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        php56: 5.6.26

Installed packages to be REINSTALLED:
        phpmailer-5.2.14 (ABI changed: 'freebsd:10:*' -> 'freebsd:11:*')


Thanks.
Arek
